metadata.description: API testing tools for AI-assisted workflows

plugins.name: tarn
plugins.description: CLI-first API testing tool for .tarn.yaml files with structured JSON output and a bundled MCP server for AI-assisted write/run/debug workflows. A companion `tarn-lsp` language server (diagnostics, hover, completion, go-to-definition, rename, formatting, and code actions for .tarn.yaml) ships separately at `editors/claude-code/tarn-lsp-plugin/`.
